title: How Claude Code's Creator ACTUALLY Automates his work
summary: Austin Marchese breaks down how Boris Cherny, Claude Code's creator, uses Claude Skills to automate work. The video covers three automation strategies: agents, hooks, and loops/scheduling, along with a framework for deciding which tasks become skills and highlighting underutilized Claude Code features.
